allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); questions=data.get\('questions',[]\); print\(f'Total: {len\(questions\)}'\); verified=[q for q in questions if q.get\('verificationStatus'\)=='verified']; print\(f'Verified: {len\(verified\)}'\); [print\(f'  {q[\\"moduleId\\"]} - {q.get\(\\"primaryTopicName\\",\\"\\"\)} - tags:{q.get\(\\"tags\\",[]\)}'\) for q in verified]")
